Guest.title: Guest
Guest.description: A guest invited to the wedding, including their rsvp status and assigned table.

id.description: Unique identifier of the guest document.

quota.description: Number of seats reserved for this guest.

tableName.description: Name of the table assigned to the guest.

notes.description: Optional notes or dedication/allergy details from the RSVP.

code.description: Unique RSVP access code for the guest.

wantsReminder.description: Whether the guest requested email/whatsapp reminders.

/guests/{guestId}.description: Collection of wedding guests and RSVPs.
